visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The scene opens at night on a large outdoor stage with industrial metal scaffolding. A woman with hair in two buns, wearing a white, yellow, and blue polka-dot dress with ruffles, stands next to a man with bright red hair. They both hold microphones and point excitedly toward the audience. A clear acrylic box containing orange tickets sits on a podium in front of them. The camera cuts to a dense crowd of people at night, many holding up glowing red crab-shaped balloons, cheering with their hands raised. (2) Transitions to daytime shots of a similar stage setup. A large screen displays a colorful animation of a cartoon character in a boat. The crowd is shown seated in an outdoor field. A close-up shows a child's hand reaching into the clear acrylic box to pick a lottery ticket. Back at night, three individuals stand on stage holding large placards showing images of the Apple iPhone 15 Pro and Apple Watch Series 9. Dancers in matching polka-dot dresses perform a synchronized routine. (3) Large, round, red and blue mascots with smiling faces dance on stage in front of a giant '2025 haha baby RUN' backdrop. A young boy in a denim jacket looks up in awe. Fireworks in red, green, and gold explode in the night sky behind a building with European-style architecture. A massive, brightly lit Ferris wheel spins in the background. The hosts return to the stage, laughing heartily and waving to the cheering crowd as thick white smoke bursts from machines behind them.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 5502林心皓. [Variety]: 哇!! (2) [Slogan]: Apple iPhone 15 Pro. Apple Watch S9. (3) [Logo]: haha baby. [Slogan]: 2025 haha baby 擁抱點點路跑 RUN. (4) [Logo]: momo親子台.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: Two main hosts (one male, one female), several stage performers, and a large audience consisting of adults and children.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: The female host wears a vibrant polka-dot dress with ruffles; the male host has dyed red hair and wears a white shirt with a blue vest.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The primary background is a large performance stage with scaffolding and a giant LED screen. Secondary backgrounds include a daytime park setting with rows of blue portable toilets and a nighttime amusement park featuring a large Ferris wheel and a castle-like building.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with high-energy shouting from a female host, calling out lottery numbers and a name in Traditional Chinese. The pitch is high and the tone is celebratory. This is immediately followed by a wave of loud cheering and applause from a crowd. A fast-tempo J-Pop style BGM with driving drums and bright synthesizers plays continuously. (2) A sharp transition occurs as the BGM volume swells, featuring a female singer performing in Japanese. Short 'whoosh' sound effects mark visual cuts between daytime and nighttime scenes. The male host's voice is heard laughing and adding brief enthusiastic exclamations. (3) Percussive booms and crackling sounds represent fireworks exploding in the distance. The audio track is a dense mix of music, crowd reactions, and high-pitched vocal delivery from the hosts. The BGM maintains a consistent high-energy rhythm until a sudden hiss from a smoke machine marks the finale, followed by the hosts laughing and thanking the audience.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Highlight Reel -> Climax -> Farewell
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a high-energy recap and promotional highlight reel for the '2025 haha baby RUN' event. It aims to capture the excitement of the live stage show, featuring lucky draws for Apple products, synchronized dance performances, and festive fireworks. The intent is to showcase the brand's engagement with its community and generate a sense of joy and high-value reward association with the 'haha baby' name.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The hosts are explicitly calling out winners for Apple iPhone and Apple Watch products, and placards with the product images are prominently displayed on stage.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses rapid-fire editing and synchronized J-pop BGM to maintain a high-arousal state, typical of short-form social media event recaps.
